description: Over his career, Georges Inness became less interested in detailed paintings and more interested in "poetic truth," conveying mood and emotion through rich tone and broad handling. He made this painting in Tarpon Springs, Florida, after recently establishing his house and studio there. Through blurred outlines, subtle tonalities, and the solitary figure, Inness evoked the brightening day and peaceful mood of the moment.
title: Early Morning, Tarpon Springs
